creator: peter@65north.com
text:
No I am not running routed or gated

ifconfig_fxp0="inet 209.193.8.97  netmask 255.255.255.224"
hostname="jago.65north.com"
gateway_enable="YES"
defaultrouter="NO"
linux_enable="YES"
accounting_enable="YES"
check_quotas="YES"
saver="daemon"
font8x8="cp437-8x8"
font8x14="cp437-8x14"
font8x16="cp437-8x16"
moused_type="NO"
moused_enable="NO"
lpd_enable="NO"
sshd_enable="YES"
network_interfaces="fxp0 lo0 tun0"
named_enable="YES"

This is driving me crazy!

peter
